title: ICBA Adds New Performance Scorecard from Jack Henry to Preferred Service Provider Program
text: MONETT, Mo., Feb., 28, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. (NASDAQ: JKHY) today announced the addition of its new Performance Scorecard tool to the Independent Community Bankers of America (ICBA) Preferred Service Provider program.

title: Jack Henry to Present at Upcoming Investor Conferences in March 2022
text: MONETT, Mo., Feb. 24, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry & Associates, Inc.® (NASDAQ:JKHY) is a leading provider of technology solutions and payment processing services primarily for the financial services industry.

title: Independent Financial Selects Jack Henry to Automate Commercial Lending
text: MONETT, Mo., Feb. 15, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. (NASDAQ: JKHY) announced today that Independent Financial has expanded its collaboration with Jack Henry, selecting the company's digital lending platform, LoanVantage®, to automate commercial loans for small and medium-sized businesses.

title: JACK HENRY & ASSOCIATES INCREASES THE QUARTERLY DIVIDEND ON ITS COMMON STOCK BY 7 PERCENT to $.49 PER SHARE
text: MONETT, Mo., Feb. 14, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. (NASDAQ: JKHY) today announced its Board of Directors increased the quarterly dividend by seven percent (7%) to $.49 per share.

title: Jack Henry (JKHY) Q2 Earnings & Revenues Beat, Rise Y/Y
text: Jack Henry's (JKHY) second-quarter fiscal 2022 results benefit from strength across Core, Complementary, Corporate and Payments segments.

title: Jack Henry (JKHY) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Jack Henry (JKHY) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 12.07% and 4.58%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. Reports Second Quarter Fiscal 2022 Results
text: MONETT, Mo., Feb. 8, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. (NASDAQ: JKHY), a leading provider of technology solutions and payment processing services primarily for the financial services industry, today announces results for the second quarter of fiscal 2022 and discusses its continued response to the novel coronavirus (COVID-19) pandemic (page 8 below).

title: What's in the Offing for Jack Henry's (JKHY) Q2 Earnings?
text: Jack Henry's (JKHY) Q2 results are expected to reflect strength across the Core, Payments and Complementary segments.

title: Jack Henry & Associates Announces Next-Generation Technology Strategy
text: MONETT, Mo., Feb. 7, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry & Associates, Inc.® (NASDAQ:JKHY) announced today a next-generation, cloud-native technology strategy that will help community and regional financial institutions innovate faster, differentiate strategically, and compete successfully while serving the evolving needs of their accountholders.

title: Planters First Bank Introduces New Jack Henry Solutions to Better Serve Business Customers
text: MONETT, Mo., Feb. 1, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Jack Henry & Associates, Inc.® (NASDAQ: JKHY) announced today that Planters First Bank launched Jack Henry capabilities to innovate and deliver competitive services that differentiate them from megabanks and big tech, supporting its vision to be the best community bank for Middle Georgia.
